proven.claim: PROVEN: totalUnverified = count of contracts where proven=0 AND violations=0
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P2, P6
; LINE: 440
; PROVEN: totalUnverified = count of contracts where proven=0 AND violations=0
(declare-const c0_proven Int)
(declare-const c0_violations Int)
(declare-const c0_unverified Bool)
(declare-const c1_proven Int)
(declare-const c1_violations Int)
(declare-const c1_unverified Bool)
(declare-const total_unverified Int)
(assert (= c0_proven 0))
(assert (= c0_violations 0))
(assert (= c0_unverified true))
(assert (= c1_proven 1))
(assert (= c1_violations 0))
(assert (= c1_unverified false))
(assert (= total_unverified (+ (ite c0_unverified 1 0) (ite c1_unverified 1 0))))
(assert (= total_unverified 1))
(assert (not (= total_unverified 1)))
(check-sat)
; unsat → total_unverified correctly counts only fully unverified contracts
